items.desc: Matcha szett Matcha Tea Profi készlet, Isamu:The Matcha Tea Isamu pro set allows you to enjoy the traditional Japanese tea ceremony. Includes a chawan tea bowl, a bamboo chashak spoon and a bamboo chasen whisk to easily…
items.raw_desc: Matcha szett Matcha Tea Profi készlet, Isamu:The Matcha Tea Isamu pro set allows you to enjoy the traditional Japanese tea ceremony. Includes a chawan tea bowl, a bamboo chashak spoon and a bamboo chasen whisk to easily prepare matcha tea. You put the ground matcha tea into a chawan tea bowl with a spoon and then gradually pour 70° water over it. Whisk the tea with a whisk until it becomes a thick foam. You can prepare a milder version of usucha tea, for this use 2 teaspoons per 70 ml of water and stir the tea in an M-shape. For a stronger koicha tea, pour 3-4 teaspoons of 40 ml of water. Then stir the tea in a gentle circular motion. items.raw_desc: Faldetektor Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor:The Einhell TE-MD 80 digital cable detector is suitable for both DIYers and professional craftsmen who carry out interior or exterior construction work. The instrument can reliably check whether there are ferrous or non-ferrous metals, wood or live wires in walls, ceilings or floors. The detection results are indicated by an acoustic signal together with an LCD display and a light indicator. If the light ring around the centering hole is green, there is no obstruction in the wall and the location can be marked as safe through the marking hole. In the case of orange, the detector approaches the object in the wall, while red indicates that the centering hole is directly above the detected object, for example a metal profile. The detector's operating mode can be set simply using the push-button control, and there is also an automatic calibration function to ensure maximum detection accuracy. The TE-MD 80 is powered by one 9V block battery (not included).                     Key features of the Einhell TE-MD...
